---
title: "Andrea Recine"
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:andrea.recine@uniroma1.it
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/andrerecio
---

I am a PhD student in Economics at the [Department of Economics and Law](https://ecodir.web.uniroma1.it/it) at [Sapienza University of Rome](https://www.uniroma1.it/).

My research focuses on Time Series Econometrics, Bayesian Econometrics, Applied Macroeconomics, and Fiscal Policy.

## Contact

- Email: [andrea.recine@uniroma1.it](mailto:andrea.recine@uniroma1.it)
- GitHub: [andrerecio](https://github.com/andrerecio)
